bundle_id_strategy.rule: Do not introduce mutable remote catalog/bundle IDs in 1.0 release trains.
bundle_id_strategy.post_1_0_requirement: Use immutable content hash + monotonic catalog versioning with staged promotion.

safe_catalog_update_ordering: 1.0 launch: no remote catalog update path; ship Resources-backed content only.
Post-1.0 pilot: publish new bundles first, then publish catalog pointer.
Rollback path: restore previous catalog pointer before deleting or replacing bundles.
Never reuse bundle IDs across incompatible payloads.
